title: Surgeon Vacancy at Solara Active Pharma - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Solara Active Pharma - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Solara Active Pharma in Visakhapatnam offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Solara Active Pharma:
Solara Active Pharma is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Solara Active Pharma!
